case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ADAM LOYD ET AL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT, AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT LOYD, ADAM
